task_completion.description: Open and read the inspection brief to find the substation locations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/inspection_brief.txt'.

task_completion.description: Enable the MAVLink gimbal by setting MNT1_TYPE to 2.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl Vehicle Setup -> Parameters menu showing the parameter 'MNT1_TYPE' set to '2'.

task_completion.description: Create a mission plan with waypoints for the substations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl Plan View showing a mission with multiple waypoints placed on the map.

task_completion.description: Set the waypoint altitude to 30 meters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The mission item list or waypoint editor in QGroundControl showing an altitude setting of '30' meters for the waypoints.

task_completion.description: Configure camera pitch to -60 degrees, a 15-second loiter, and a pitch reset to 0 degrees.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The mission item list in QGroundControl showing commands for setting camera pitch to '-60', a loiter time of '15' seconds, and setting camera pitch to '0' for transit.

task_completion.description: Include a Return to Launch (RTL) command at the end of the mission.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The mission item list in QGroundControl showing a 'Return to Launch' (RTL) command as the final step of the mission.

task_completion.description: Save the mission plan to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file save dialog in QGroundControl or a file manager window showing 'solar_patrol.plan' saved in the '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the QGroundControl GUI to create the mission plan.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the QGroundControl application interface (Plan View, mission item editors) rather than writing a .plan file directly in a text editor.

integrity.description: The parameter change for MNT1_TYPE was done through the QGC Parameters interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the QGroundControl Parameters screen being searched and edited, not a configuration file being modified via terminal.

integrity.description: The agent actively built the mission rather than copying a pre-made file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the step-by-step addition and configuration of waypoints and camera commands in QGroundControl.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected mission plan path is '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/solar_patrol.plan'. The brief path is '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/inspection_brief.txt'. The configuration requires MNT1_TYPE = 2.0, waypoint altitude = 30.0 m, inspection pitch = -60.0 degrees, transit pitch = 0.0 degrees, and a loiter time = 15.0 seconds.
